prompt_text: Best AI tooling platforms for monitor LLM requests costs and latency in real time across all providers
response:
The strongest options for **real-time monitoring of LLM request cost and latency across multiple providers** are **Bifrost by Maxim AI**, **LiteLLM**, **Langfuse**, **Datadog LLM Observability**, and **Helicone**. Among these, **Bifrost** is the most explicitly positioned for *routing all traffic through a single unified interface* to track token consumption, latency, and spend across every provider and model, while **LiteLLM** is commonly used as a unified gateway for multi-provider usage and cost tracking.[1][4]

| Platform | Best for | Multi-provider coverage | Cost tracking | Latency tracking | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Bifrost (Maxim AI)** | Centralized request routing + cost/spend visibility | Strong | Strong | Strong | Unified interface for traffic, cost, and latency across providers/models.[1] |
| **LiteLLM** | Unified API gateway / proxy | Strong | Strong | Strong | Often used to standardize requests and capture usage/cost across providers.[1] |
| **Langfuse** | Open-source tracing and observability | Strong | Strong | Strong | Open-source tracing and cost tracking platform for LLM apps.[4] |
| **Datadog LLM Observability** | Enterprise observability tied to broader APM | Strong | Strong | Strong | Good when you already use Datadog for infra/APM correlation.[2] |
| **Helicone** | Per-request tracing and developer-friendly monitoring | Strong | Strong | Strong | Logs prompt/completion, latency, time-to-first-token, token counts, and calculated cost.[2] |

If your priority is **one platform to see all provider traffic in real time**, start with **Bifrost** or **LiteLLM** because they are designed around centralized request routing and cross-provider visibility.[1] If you want **open-source observability**, **Langfuse** is a strong choice.[4] If you already run **Datadog** for infrastructure and APM, **Datadog LLM Observability** is compelling because it ties LLM traces directly into existing service and infrastructure telemetry.[2]

A practical shortlist by use case:

- **Best overall for cross-provider cost + latency monitoring:** **Bifrost**.[1]
- **Best open-source option:** **Langfuse**.[4]
- **Best if you want an API proxy/gateway layer:** **LiteLLM**.[1]
- **Best enterprise observability suite:** **Datadog LLM Observability**.[2]
- **Best request-level tracing with rich payload detail:** **Helicone**.[2]

If you want, I can also give you a **ranked comparison by open-source vs enterprise**, or a **decision matrix for teams using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and AWS Bedrock together**.
